prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第27名（近年稳定在23–27名），属全国顶尖高校行列。
4. 【声誉热度】2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（原校长张尧学被查事件）；2024–2025年均有投档线断档记录（2024年中关注、2025年重庆地下空间工程专业断档）；抖音热度排 名第85位（一般），整体曝光量中等偏低；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共13个：冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、交通运输工程A-、计算 机科学与技术A-、机械工程A-、控制科学与工程A-等，学科实力雄厚，与招生专业（计算机类、自动化类、临床医学类、材料类等）高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类 热度从高热推荐降温至推荐，电子信息/通信持续高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐升温，临床医学推荐但小幅降温，土木建筑明显劝退；本省2026年物理类考生数约11.08 万人（较2025年8.37万增长约32.3%），竞争压力显著增大；中南大学位于湖南长沙，非本省高校；内蒙古考生跨省报考 中南大学需考虑地域偏好，但该校作为全国性985综合类大学，跨省吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的基准、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（-3.5%）、本省物 理类考生大幅增长（+32.3%）、声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约2875名，区间2465–3285名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 6419 → 4110 → 4764 → 6865 → 2886. In 2025, it significantly advanced to 2886th, an increase of about 3979 places compared to 2024, showing drastic fluctuations. The average ranking over the past 5 years is about 5009, with a 2025 baseline of about 2886. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 183 in 2021, 178 in 2022–2024, 170 in 2025, and 164 in 2026, a reduction of 6 students (about -3.5%) compared to 2025. Enrollment quotas continue to shrink, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 27th (stable at 23–27 in recent years), belonging to the top tier of national universities.
4. [Reputation Heat] During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (former president Zhang Yaoxue under investigation); there were records of score cutoff drops in 2024–2025 (noted in 2024, and a drop in the underground space engineering major in Chongqing in 2025). Douyin popularity ranks 85th (average), with overall exposure moderately low. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, etc. The disciplinary strength is robust, highly matching the enrollment majors (Computer Class, Automation Class, Clinical Medicine Class, Materials Class, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Class has cooled from high-heat recommendation to recommendation; Electronic Information/Communication remains high-heat recommendation; Electrical Engineering and Automation has heated up to high-heat recommendation; Clinical Medicine is recommended but slightly cooling; Civil Engineering is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in the province is about 110,800 (an increase of about 32.3% from 83,700 in 2025), significantly increasing competition pressure. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, not a local university. Inner Mongolia students applying across provinces to Central South University need to consider regional preferences, but as a national 985 comprehensive university, its cross-provincial appeal is relatively strong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the significant ranking advancement in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (-3.5%), the substantial increase in provincial physics category examinees (+32.3%), the negative reputation, and average Douyin popularity, competition in 2026 is expected to slightly intensify compared to 2025, with a minor ranking decline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2875, with a range of 2465–3285.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Clinical Medicine Class (Clinical and Stomatology Five-Year Medical Class)
- Automation Class (Automation and Electrical Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Class
- Software Engineering
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Mechanical Class
- Energy and Power Class (Energy Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Class (Metallurgical Materials Class)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class (Chemistry, Biology, Environment Class)
- Civil Engineering Class (Engineering Pilot Class, Rail Transit Infrastructure and Safety Class)
- Surveying and Mapping Class (Remote Sensing, Surveying, Mapping, and Geoinformatics Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (2465–3285), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Computer Class), and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2465), prioritize sprinting for popular majors like Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program and Computer Class. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>3285), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors like Materials Class and Chemical Class, while also considering Tier 2 majors like Mechanical Class and Energy Class.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1498 → 2400 → 1254 → 1159 → 511, with a continuous upward trend in the last 3 years, and a significant increase to 511th place in 2025, an improvement of about 648 places compared to 2024; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 511th place.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial liberal arts (history category) plan was 23 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 30 in 2025, and is planned at 29 in 2026, a reduction of 1 student (about -3.3%) compared to 2025, with a slight decrease in enrollment quota.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities; reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative (due to the investigation of former president Zhang Yaoxue); there was a record of a cutoff score drop in 2024 (moderate attention); Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (average), with overall exposure moderately low; advantageous disciplines related to liberal arts enrollment majors: Marxist Theory A- (weakly related to Chinese Language and Literature, Law, etc.), Law has no separate rating; the school is primarily focused on engineering and medicine, with relatively limited strength in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Finance/Finance/Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Foreign Language and Literature is generally wait-and-see; the number of history category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 43,200 (an increase of about 32.3% from 32,600 in 2025), significantly increasing competition pressure; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, not a local university; Inner Mongolia candidates applying across provinces need to consider regional preferences, but the 985 level of the school still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant upward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan in 2026 (-3.3%), the substantial increase in local history category examinees (+32.3%), and the somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings slightly declining. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 516th place, with a range of 442–590.
